known_risks: whole-document context may exceed the practical local supervisor window
large reports may need deterministic pruning before paid coordinator review
a no-tool supervisor may summarize too coarsely unless the custom role is explicit
roi_hypothesis: A single document-level delegated supervisor job should reduce paid coordinator micromanagement if the local supervisor returns a usable seed or a compact failure report after at most one bounce.

success_thresholds.coordinator_token_budget_target: less than half the P90+P91 chunk-pipeline minimum
success_thresholds.preferred_candidate_records: enough to cover title, structure, tables, assumptions, and named quantities
